title: pelea elliptica
intro: Pelea elliptica, also known as the Mountain Rose or Kuluau, is a flowering plant species native to Hawaii. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Pelea elliptica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy among locals and herbalists alike.
